response.justification: The candidate significantly exceeds the 6+ years requirement with deep full-stack experience spanning TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB in production systems at scale (millions of mails/year, millions of requests/sec). Current hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling directly matches the required AI agent development experience, and a demonstrated software-craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, test tooling authorship) fits the quality-focused responsibilities. Gaps are mostly at the framework level: no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest/Playwright exposure, and recent frontend work leans more toward Ember than React.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes in production
Current AI-agent and MCP tooling work directly matches the AI agent development requirement
Strong testing and craftsmanship track record: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, a core framework in the primary stack
Kotlin and Python absent from skills; Java experience appears dated
Frontend depth skews toward Ember.js; React exposure appears limited to one role

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and Kotlin from primary/secondary stack
